---
title: "ISCD Worksheet 7"
author: "Anurag Bhunia(bmat2508@isibang.ac.in)"
output: pdf_document
---

1. b)

```{r}
n=10
#i.
x=runif(n,0,7)
y=numeric(n)
c=1
for(i in x){
    f=(16+sin(i))/(i^2 +4)
    y[c]=f
    c=c+1
}
sum(y)/n
#ii.
n=50
sim=replicate(n,{
   x=runif(n,0,7)
   y=numeric(n)
   c=1
   for(i in x){
    f=(16+sin(i))/(i^2 +4)
    y[c]=f
    c=c+1
    }
    mean(y) 
})
7*mean(sim)
```

c)

```{r}
f=function(x) (16+sin(x))/(x^2 +4)
integrate(f,0,7)
```

2.

b)

```{r}
x=rhyper(100,50,0,20)
x
```

d)

```{r}
N=c(50,100,200,300,400,500);
lm=numeric(length(N));
lv=numeric(length(N));
c=1;
for(i in N){
    x=rhyper(1000,50,i-50,20);
    y=1000/x[x!=0];
    m=mean(y);
    v=var(y);
    lm[c]=m;
    lv[c]=v;
    c=c+1
}
plot(N,lm,type="l",main="Mean sample size");
plot(N,lv,type="l",main="Variance of sample size");
```
